audience_policies.source_phrase: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card (no museum pass needed) at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card (no museum pass needed) at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.
